episodes.name: Episode 01 - 04
episodes.overview: Vicky, a sex-craving young man, meets Swapnali, his new Facebook friend, for a booty call. The two decide to go to a popular make-out point. Accidentally, Vicky’s father’s friend spots them making out and narrates the incident to Vicky’s family.
